examples: When much blood had clogged their chariot wheels, I would go up and wash them from sweet wells, even with truths that lie too deep for taint.
Rancid oil will taint the flavour.
Boar taint originates from androstenone and skatole.
And if he does not, it will be a taint that will be hard to erase.
Another consideration is that active defense may taint the evidence needed for an investigation.
